body.body: Build ~/.claude/skills/sprint/SKILL.md. On invoke: (1) run context-load to get current state; (2) read cc_queue for next pending ticket (or accept ticket ID as arg); (3) announce on channel: tab/session name + ticket claimed; (4) work the ticket using workstep discipline; (5) on completion: write result to queue, post to channel, surface next ticket. Composites: context-load skill + channel client. Makes multi-session CC work: each tab runs /sprint, picks a ticket, works independently, all visible in channel. No scribe, no savestate ritual — result goes to queue + channel, that IS the record.
body.title: sprint skill — pick up a ticket, work it, report back
body.result: SKILL.md built and live. Queue-based ticket claim + channel post pattern defined.
